title: Session management core types definition
purpose: Defines the TypeScript interfaces for session data structures used in the application's session management system.
module_context: Exports four interface types: Session, CollabState, VerificationIssue, and TaskBatch with their respective properties and relationships.

steps.content: Define the structure for session data including project identifier and name.
Include optional display name field for user-friendly session identification.
Add optional timestamp for last activity to track session freshness.
Include optional item count to represent session content size.
Define the collaborative state structure with display name and state.
Include required timestamp for last activity tracking.
Add optional array of verification issues that may affect collaboration.
Include optional worktree path for file system navigation.
Add optional array of batches containing task information.
Include optional arrays for tracking completed and pending tasks.
Define the structure for verification issues with drift type.
Include required phase field to identify issue context.
Add required description field for issue explanation.
Include required file field to identify affected file.
Add required timestamp for when issue was detected.
Define the structure for individual tasks within a batch.
Include required task identifier.
Add required status field with specific allowed values.
Include required array of task dependencies.
Define the structure for task batches containing multiple tasks.
Include required batch identifier.
Add required array of tasks within this batch.
Include required status field with specific allowed values.
